TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dragan Bender nalecuhan i Čapljina, Bosnia and Herzegovina, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dragan Bender i 2016 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 4, namapili' tu nu Phoenix Suns putiput. 11 bulad 17 demiad, 1997 a mihca, Dragan Bender, miunduay.
S.PHON: dragan bəndər nar~ɾəʦuħan i *apr~ɾjina, bosnia and ħərzəgo*ina, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. dragan bəndər i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu pħoəni* suns putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, dragan bəndər, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Dragan Bender nalecuhan i Čapljina, Bosnia and Herzegovina, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dragan Bender i 2016 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 4, namapili' tu nu Phoenix Suns putiput. 11 bulad 17 demiad, 1997 a mihca, Dragan Bender, miunduay.
S.PHON: dragan bəndər nar~ɾəʦuħan i *apr~ɾjina, bosnia and ħərzəgo*ina, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. dragan bəndər i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu pħoəni* suns putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, dragan bəndər, miunduaj.
